# Vehicle Code
## Division 7. FINANCIAL RESPONSIBILITY LAWS [16000 - 16560]
### Chapter 1. Compulsory Financial Responsibility [16000 - 16078]
#### Article 4. Suspensions [16070 - 16078]
##### § 16074

Whenever the department has taken any action or has failed to take any action under this chapter by reason of having received erroneous information, or by reason of having received no information, it shall take appropriate action to carry out the purposes and effect of this chapter upon receiving correct information.

*(Added by Stats. 1974, Ch. 1409.)*

subsections.text: Whenever the department has taken any action or has failed to take any action under this chapter by reason of having received erroneous information, or by reason of having received no information, it shall take appropriate action to carry out the purposes and effect of this chapter upon receiving correct information.
